task: Complete one bounded implementation task inside the current parent session.
constraints: Do not launch codex exec workers.
acceptance_criteria: The result is verified and reviewed in the same parent session.

phases.name: scan
phases.goal: Inspect the current repository state and identify the smallest safe edit surface.
validation: List the initial files to inspect.

phases.name: plan
phases.goal: Choose the smallest safe plan and the narrowest useful validation commands.

phases.name: implement
phases.goal: Make the bounded code or documentation changes.
validation: Keep edits inside the declared scope.

phases.name: verify
phases.goal: Run the narrowest useful checks and capture only compact results.

phases.name: review
phases.goal: Perform a read-only review of the final changed files.
validation: Call out regressions, scope drift, and missing tests if present.
Accept only if the final state is coherent.
